title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Trust, Message Framing, and Smuggling Defense · Execution Trace: Proxy Query Response Defense
summary: A gateway preserves client Forwarded fields, uses deprecated ReverseProxy.Director, disagrees with an upstream about malformed framing, forwards hop-by-hop fields, and constructs unsafe backend queries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo proxy query response defense increment in proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle unparsable query parameters, backend timeouts, bounded bodies, ModifyResponse, ErrorHandler, streaming, Alt-Svc, and sanitized failure evidence.
Prevent request smuggling by rejecting ambiguous Content-Length and Transfer-Encoding, malformed whitespace, conflicting parsers, oversized fields, and unsafe downgrade paths per RFC 9112.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Predict Proxy Query Response Defense · Theory Proxy Query Response Defense
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 1012 in a public status API serving assistive and low-bandwidth clients. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ambiguous framing and deprecated Director-style proxy mutation; then replay the same operation key with different content and reject the mismatch. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Handle unparsable query parameters, backend timeouts, bounded bodies, ModifyResponse, ErrorHandler, streaming, Alt-Svc, and sanitized failure evidence.
